svg.text: • A/B test assignment: exhaustive cohort permutations for small experiment matrices.
• Feature selection in ML: enumerate subsets of features, train, score (small n only).
• Combinatorial pricing models: bundle k products from n catalog.
• Permutation tests in statistics (resampling-based hypothesis testing).
• Chemistry: enumerate molecular isomers (graphs with specified vertices/labels).
• Test-suite generation: combinatorial test design (pairwise / t-way coverage).
• Lexicographic order: next_permutation in C++ STL — O(1) amortized.
• Heap's Algorithm: all n! permutations via adjacent swaps; one swap per output.
• Gray code: all 2ⁿ subsets visiting each by single-bit flips.
• Lehmer / factorial-base codes: direct rank ↔ permutation conversion.
• Reservoir sampling: uniform random k-sample from streamed n elements.
When you need ALL of them, generate lazily; when you need ONE, sample directly.
